working_on.notes: Fixed critical data loss issues for Dropdown images and Riddle questions. Verified both frontend editor and backend mapping.

recent_changes.description: Fixed Dropdown Question: Added image field support in Editor and Google Sheet service (mapped to 'image' column)
Fixed Riddle Question: Mapped riddleLines (items), answerLabel (text), hint (sentence) to generic Sheet columns to prevent data loss
Fixed Image Question Editor: Added missing text input fields for answer options
Added 'Home' button to Student Portal Assignments View for easier navigation
Fixed Guest Visibility: Guests now see a 'Login Required' prompt instead of 'No quizzes found' in Class Assignments tab
Fixed Assignment Details: Fetching Title, Time Limit, and Max Score correctly from Quiz Store instead of using fallback defaults
Implemented 'Coming Soon' Modal with 3D Rocket icon for Science/History categories
Adjusted UI: Increased Subject Card Label font size (0.95rem), icon size (60px), and refined scroll margins
Backed up entire source code to backups/20260211_pre_virtual_classroom before starting Virtual Classroom features
Created detailed implementation plan and specs for Virtual Classroom (Classes, Students, Assignments)
Added difficulty dropdown UI to QuizPreview Edit/Add modals + colored badge in preview list (green/yellow/red for levels 1/2/3)
Fixed AI distractor generation failing - improved parseJSONResponse regex for markdown code blocks, updated system prompt, added debug logging
Fixed UNDERLINE word chips rendering - added resolveCorrectWordIndexes helper with 4-level fallback (quiz -> correctAnswer -> snapshot -> validationDetails)
Fixed QuestionAnalysis TỶ LỆ ĐÚNG = 0% - added correctAnswers field for MULTIPLE_SELECT
Fixed LaTeX not rendering in QuestionAnalysisTable - replaced dangerouslySetInnerHTML with MathSpan

decisions_made.decision: Map Riddle fields to generic Sheet columns
decisions_made.reason: Avoid modifying external GAS script or Sheet structure. items->riddleLines, text->answerLabel, sentence->hint.

decisions_made.decision: Choose 'Virtual Classroom' approach over simple link sharing
decisions_made.reason: Better long-term tracking and student management capabilities

decisions_made.decision: Difficulty dropdown uses select element with green focus ring, consistent with existing design
decisions_made.reason: Matches DifficultyLevelSelector green theme, simple and familiar UI pattern

decisions_made.decision: Difficulty badge uses star emojis with colored backgrounds (green/yellow/red)
decisions_made.reason: Visual distinction by color for quick scanning, matches common education UI patterns

decisions_made.decision: Use non-greedy regex for AI response markdown stripping
decisions_made.reason: Old regex ^```json only matched start of string. AI wraps response in ```json...``` with leading whitespace, causing parse failure
Anti-cheat stripAnswerFields removes correctWordIndexes. Need multiple data sources: quiz object → correctAnswer → snapshot → validationDetails

errors_encountered.error: Dropdown Question images not saving (User Reported)
errors_encountered.solution: Frontend: Added image state to Edit Modal. Backend: Mapped 'image' column in googleSheetService.

errors_encountered.error: Riddle Question data lost on save (User Reported)
errors_encountered.solution: Backend: Mapped riddleLines->items, answerLabel->text, hint->sentence in googleSheetService to use existing columns.

errors_encountered.error: AI distractor generation fails: 'AI không thể tạo đáp án nhiễu'
errors_encountered.solution: parseJSONResponse regex couldn't strip markdown code blocks. Fixed with non-greedy regex /```(?:json)?\\s*([\\s\\S]*?)```/ and updated system prompt

errors_encountered.error: UNDERLINE word chips all show red (Gạch sai) even when answer is correct
errors_encountered.solution: correctWordIndexes stripped by anti-cheat. Added resolveCorrectWordIndexes helper with 4-level fallback in both DetailedAnswersTab and ResultScreen
